input.old_string:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Stamp the static site (docs/) with the current release version and date.
# Reads the version from the VERSION file at the repository root and updates:
#   - docs/sitemap.xml       <lastmod>YYYY-MM-DD</lastmod>
#   - docs/site.webmanifest  "version": "x.y.z"
#
# The `version` field in site.webmanifest is driven by the VERSION file, which
# release-please bumps as part of the release PR. This script is the single
# docs-generation step that propagates that value into both site artifacts.
#
# Run this from the release workflow *after* release-please has produced a tag,
# or locally before pushing a release commit.
#
# Usage:
#   scripts/stamp-site-version.sh [YYYY-MM-DD]
#
#   Defaults to today (UTC).
set -euo pipefail

cd "$(dirname "$0")/.."

DATE="${1:-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)}"
SITEMAP="docs/sitemap.xml"
MANIFEST="docs/site.webmanifest"
VERSION_FILE="VERSION"

if [ ! -f "$SITEMAP" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $SITEMAP not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$MANIFEST" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $MANIFEST not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$VERSION_FILE" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $VERSION_FILE not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi
input.new_string:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Stamp the static site (docs/) with the current release version and date.
# Reads the version from the VERSION file at the repository root and updates:
#   - docs/sitemap.xml       <lastmod>YYYY-MM-DD</lastmod>
#   - docs/site.webmanifest  "version": "x.y.z"
#   - docs/llms.txt          "- Current version: x.y.z"
#
# The `version` field in site.webmanifest and the "Current version" line in
# llms.txt are both driven by the VERSION file, which release-please bumps as
# part of the release PR. This script is the single docs-generation step that
# propagates that value into all site artifacts.
#
# Run this from the release workflow *after* release-please has produced a tag,
# or locally before pushing a release commit.
#
# Usage:
#   scripts/stamp-site-version.sh [YYYY-MM-DD]
#
#   Defaults to today (UTC).
set -euo pipefail

cd "$(dirname "$0")/.."

DATE="${1:-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)}"
SITEMAP="docs/sitemap.xml"
MANIFEST="docs/site.webmanifest"
LLMS="docs/llms.txt"
VERSION_FILE="VERSION"

if [ ! -f "$SITEMAP" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $SITEMAP not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$MANIFEST" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $MANIFEST not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$LLMS" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $LLMS not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$VERSION_FILE" ]; then
    echo "stamp-site-version: $VERSION_FILE not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

echo "stamp-site-version: set version=$VERSION in $MANIFEST"

# Update llms.txt "Current version" line.
TMP="$(mktemp)"
awk -v ver="$VERSION" '
    /^- Current version:/ {
        sub(/^- Current version: [^[:space:]]+/, "- Current version: " ver)
    }
    { print }
' "$LLMS" > "$TMP"
mv "$TMP" "$LLMS"
echo "stamp-site-version: set version=$VERSION in $LLMS"

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Validate that static site docs are consistent with Packaging/Info.plist.
#
# Checks that the minimum macOS version declared in Info.plist is reflected in
# docs/llms.txt and docs/index.html — providing a CI signal when
# LSMinimumSystemVersion is updated without updating the static docs.
#
# Run as part of `make validate` or directly in CI.
set -euo pipefail

cd "$(dirname "$0")/.."

ERRORS=0
PLIST="Packaging/Info.plist"

if [ ! -f "$PLIST" ]; then
    echo "check-site-docs: $PLIST not found" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Extract the major macOS version from LSMinimumSystemVersion (e.g., "13.0" → "13").
# Uses grep + sed to be portable across both BSD (macOS) and GNU (Linux/CI) toolchains.
MIN_VERSION=$(grep -A1 'LSMinimumSystemVersion' "$PLIST" \
    | grep '<string>' \
    | sed 's|[^0-9]*\([0-9]*\).*|\1|')

if [ -z "$MIN_VERSION" ]; then
    echo "check-site-docs: could not read LSMinimumSystemVersion from $PLIST" >&2
    exit 1
fi

check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then
        echo "check-site-docs: FAIL — $file not found" >&2
        ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
        return
    fi
    if ! grep -q "macOS $MIN_VERSION" "$file"; then
        echo "check-site-docs: FAIL — $file does not mention 'macOS $MIN_VERSION'" >&2
        echo "  Info.plist LSMinimumSystemVersion is ${MIN_VERSION}.x — update the docs to match." >&2
        ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
    else
        echo "check-site-docs: OK — $file mentions 'macOS $MIN_VERSION'"
    fi
}

check_file docs/llms.txt
check_file docs/index.html

if [ "$ERRORS" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "check-site-docs: $ERRORS check(s) failed." >&2
    exit 1
fi

echo "check-site-docs: all checks passed (LSMinimumSystemVersion ${MIN_VERSION}.x)"

input.description: Mark check-site-docs.sh executable in git index

input.command: git -C /Users/nick/development/endash/gotobed add scripts/check-site-docs.sh && git -C /Users/nick/development/endash/gotobed update-index --chmod=+x scripts/check-site-docs.sh
input.description: Add and mark check-site-docs.sh executable in git
Verify executable bit in git index

input.new_string:

input.old_string:
stamp-docs:
    # Stamp docs/ with the release version and date.
    # stamp-site-version.sh reads VERSION (bumped by release-please) and updates:
    #   - docs/sitemap.xml       <lastmod> with today's UTC date
    #   - docs/site.webmanifest  "version" with the VERSION value
    needs: release-please
    if: ${{ needs.release-please.outputs.release_created == 'true' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: main
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Stamp docs version and date
        run: ./scripts/stamp-site-version.sh
      - name: Commit stamped docs
        run: |
          if git diff --quiet docs/sitemap.xml docs/site.webmanifest; then
            echo "No changes to docs."
            exit 0
          fi
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add docs/sitemap.xml docs/site.webmanifest
          git commit -m "chore: stamp docs for ${{ needs.release-please.outputs.tag_name }} [skip ci]"
          git push
input.new_string:
stamp-docs:
    # Stamp docs/ with the release version and date.
    # stamp-site-version.sh reads VERSION (bumped by release-please) and updates:
    #   - docs/sitemap.xml       <lastmod> with today's UTC date
    #   - docs/site.webmanifest  "version" with the VERSION value
    #   - docs/llms.txt          "Current version" with the VERSION value
    needs: release-please
    if: ${{ needs.release-please.outputs.release_created == 'true' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: main
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Stamp docs version and date
        run: ./scripts/stamp-site-version.sh
      - name: Commit stamped docs
        run: |
          if git diff --quiet docs/sitemap.xml docs/site.webmanifest docs/llms.txt; then
            echo "No changes to docs."
            exit 0
          fi
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add docs/sitemap.xml docs/site.webmanifest docs/llms.txt
          git commit -m "chore: stamp docs for ${{ needs.release-please.outputs.tag_name }} [skip ci]"
          git push

input.description: Run make validate to test all changes
Re-run make validate with sh prefix fix

input.resolutionDetail: Added "Current version" field to llms.txt stamped by release workflow; new check-site-docs.sh validates macOS version consistency between Info.plist and static docs; wired into make validate and release.yml stamp-docs job.

input.detail: Three documentation drift findings addressed: (1) Added "- Current version: 0.2.1" to docs/llms.txt Key facts section — this field is now stamped by stamp-site-version.sh on each release, giving llms.txt an automated link to the VERSION source; (2) Extended stamp-site-version.sh to update llms.txt in addition to sitemap.xml and site.webmanifest; (3) Created scripts/check-site-docs.sh that reads LSMinimumSystemVersion from Packaging/Info.plist and validates docs/llms.txt and docs/index.html both mention the correct macOS major version — provides CI signal when Info.plist changes without matching doc updates; (4) Wired check-site-docs.sh into `make validate`; (5) Updated release.yml stamp-docs job to include llms.txt in the diff check and commit. All 44 tests pass.

input.content:
fix: automate version stamping and drift detection for static site docs

- Add "Current version: 0.2.1" to docs/llms.txt Key facts section so the
  file has an authoritative version field that gets stamped on release
- Extend scripts/stamp-site-version.sh to also update the "Current version"
  line in docs/llms.txt (joins sitemap.xml and site.webmanifest)
- Add scripts/check-site-docs.sh: reads LSMinimumSystemVersion from
  Packaging/Info.plist and validates that docs/llms.txt and docs/index.html
  both mention the correct macOS major version — CI fails if Info.plist
  changes without matching the static docs
- Wire check-site-docs.sh into `make validate` so the check runs locally and
  in CI on every push
- Update release.yml stamp-docs job to include docs/llms.txt in the diff
  check and release commit

- Extended `scripts/stamp-site-version.sh` to update this line on each release (using the same awk+tmpfile atomic approach as the other stamps)
